description: Registry of domain families, member domains, and alignment keys. Alignment keys are identity_item fields shared across domains within a family that governance expects to be consistent. Used for cross-domain alignment scoring in analysis and BI.

dimension_types.description: All Revit dimension style types grouped by system family
dimension_types.notes: Linear family (linear, angular) share witness_line_control. Radial/Diameter share center mark fields. Spot families each have unique primary unit fields. Alignment keys are the subset applicable to ALL member domains.

view_templates.description: View templates grouped by Revit ViewType family as shown in UI
view_templates.notes: Alignment keys are VG overrides applicable to all view types. View Range, Rendering Settings etc. are domain-specific and not alignment keys.

object_styles.description: Object styles grouped by Revit category type tab
object_styles.notes: Cut weight and material are only applicable to Model tab — not alignment keys. Imported tab uses render material from CAD source, not governed Revit material.

fill_patterns.description: Fill patterns grouped by Revit target (Drafting vs Model)
fill_patterns.notes: Alignment key enables asking whether a geometric pattern exists in both Drafting and Model libraries.

arrowheads.description: Arrowhead types — single domain, single member
arrowheads.notes: Single-member family. No cross-domain alignment applicable.

line_patterns.description: Line patterns — single domain, single member

line_styles.description: Line styles — single domain, single member

text_types.description: Text note types — single domain, single member
text_types.notes: Single-member family. Font, size, width_factor are already in identity_items and available for cross-family alignment scoring without extractor changes.
